title: India’s BRICS Presidency, South Asia and Future of Regional Cooperation
description: BRICS represents a substantial share of the world’s population and economic output. As India assumes the BRICS rotational presidency in 2026, it is expected to promote a people-centred agenda focused on digital public infrastructure, climate action, clean energy transitions, and […] The post India’s BRICS Presidency, South Asia and Future of Regional Cooperation appeared first on Centre for Public Policy Research (CPPR).
